title: 7.5T GVM, Double cab, AMT, Tipper, Toolbox
description:
Green Space Double-Cab Truck Specifications

7.5T GVM, Double cab, AMT, Tipper, Toolbox
•	Configuration: Double-cab chassis 
•	GVM (Gross Vehicle Mass): 7.5 T 
•	Truck cab Colour: OEM White
•	Transmission: AMT (Automated Manual Transmission) or equivalent 
•	Wheelbase: 3850mm or similar
•	Emission level: must meet or exceed ADR 80/04 (Euro 6) 
•	Features:
o	Air Conditioning
o	Electric heated mirrors
o	Bluetooth hands-free system
o	Two sets of keys
o	Extra seat padding for front and rear fixed seats
o	Reversing camera and reversing alarm
o	Tinted windows to NHVR limits 
o	Yellow grab handles in cab
o	Yellow steps on cabin exterior
o	Hydraulic cabin lift mechanism
Tipper Body Specifications:
•	Capacity: 3 Tonnes
•	Construction: High-Density (HD) steel construction
•	Dimensions: Approximately 2400 mm (L) x 2200 mm (W), unless otherwise specified, the overall width of the body shall be no more than 200mm wider than the truck cab
•	Features:
o	450mm high drop sides with fixed corner posts and a 600mm two-way tailgate
o	Lift weight on drop sides not to exceed 20 Kg
o	5mm smooth steel floor
o	40mm tailgate lock bar with 4 locking lugs and mechanical lock(s)
o	Replaceable Heavy-Duty tip body hinges
o	Multi-stage under-body hoist with safety prop painted safety-yellow (H-Frame)
o	Tie rails either side below tray level
o	Off-road pin type tow bar (Cruisemaster D035 or equivalent) with 12V 7-pin small round coupling socket and, if the trailer electric brakes are fitted, 12-pin flat connector (connected in accordance with Australian Standard AS4177.5-2004)
o	Tow bar fully integrated under the bodyline to prevent damage to the tow bar and to avoid obstruction during the tipping process.
o	Electric trailer brake module with in-cab battery level indicator, a breakaway monitoring system, and charging system with a charging indicator in cabin if required.
o	Battery isolator switch
o	If the trailer equipped with electric brakes, an Anderson plug shall be installed at rear end for charging trailer’s battery.
Additional Features:
•	Foldable, non-slip climbing side-step (non-slip, minimum dimensions of 300 mm depth and 400mm width) inside passenger’s side (LHS) front drop gate with a handrail on the front board, all painted safety-yellow for visibility and safety
Rear-Facing Arrow Sign:
•	A rear-facing, Type B, single-sided electric folding flashing arrow sign mounted above the load board.
•	Equip the sign with two (Class 1 rated) rotating amber beacon lights, one on each side, beacon lights should be installed at a height to ensure visibility for motorists immediately behind the truck, enhancing overall visibility

Toolbox and Access Steps:
•	Fixed toolbox dimensions: 2200mm (L) x 1400mm (H) x 900mm (W), located between the cabin and load board, mounted on the chassis rail 
•	Toolbox features:
o	Toolbox shall be fabricated with 3mm aluminium plate
o	 Swing open, lockable, waterproof barn doors with metal lip (instead of rubber seal), and gas struts
o	One shelf positioned 600mm below the top of the box. The top half of the toolbox should be divided in the middle by a vertical aluminium plate.
o	All shelves constructed from 3mm thick aluminium, with rolled edges (10mm lip)
o	A fold out step below the toolbox on both sides, and handrails inside the toolbox all painted safety-yellow, to access the top shelf with minimum 600mm clearance
o	Whale-tail type locks on all doors
•	Toolbox Ventilation:
o	Air vents on the doors of the toolbox, ensuring optimal airflow and ventilation within the toolbox



Water Tank:
•	Incorporate a water tank with a 50-liter capacity, equipped with a breather filler cap and a dispensing tap.
•	The tank should be mounted at a suitable position on the passenger side of the vehicle. The tank shall be located a minimum of 600mm above ground level. Water tank should be labelled “NOT FOR DRINKING”.
•	A soap dispenser should be mounted near the water dispensing tap for convenient access.

Tipper Body Paint and Coating:
•	The exterior of the tipper body should be painted in "OEM Cab Chassis white" using 2PAK colour paint.
•	Leave the toolboxes unpainted to maintain their original material finish.
•	The interior of the tipper body should be coated with a black rustproof epoxy to prevent corrosion.
Additional Features:
•	Rubber flap mudguards to protect against road debris and splashes

Paint and Coating:
•	All access steps, grab handles, handrails, and safety props provided shall be painted safety yellow-Paint code Y15.
Signage:
•	All lettering used to indicate the vehicle’s GVM, GCM and Tare mass shall be at least 50mm in size ad be of Commercial Grade.
•	All trucks must comply to VSB12 (Rear Marker Plate)
Custom paint:
•	Custom colours to the bodies and toolboxes (colours to be advised) (Price as option)
•	Brand guidelines and the colour codes of our logo should be used
